sections.name: Entrance Antiphon
sections.snippet: Rejoice in the Lord always; again I say, rejoice. Indeed, the Lord is near.
sections.song: Let Us All Rejoice - Steve Angrisano, Sarah Hart, Curtis Stephan

sections.name: Responsorial Psalm
sections.snippet: Cry out with joy and gladness: for among you is the great and Holy One of Israel.

sections.name: Gospel Acclamation
sections.snippet: The Spirit of the Lord is upon me, because he has anointed me to bring glad tidings to the poor.
sections.song: Mass of the Desert - Tom Booth

sections.name: Offertory
sections.snippet: Scattered and broken, bent in our way, we are your people gathered to praise you. A vineyard uprooted, narrow in sight. Come, Lord of Glory! Come, Lord of Light!

sections.name: Communion Antiphon
sections.snippet: Say to the faint of heart: Be strong and do not fear. Behold, our God will come, and he will save us.
sections.song: Let Us All Rejoice - Steve Angrisano, Sarah Hart, Curtis Stephan

sections.name: Communion Antiphon
sections.snippet: Say to the faint of heart: Be strong and do not fear. Behold, our God will come, and he will save us.
sections.song: Let Us All Rejoice - Steve Angrisano, Sarah Hart, Curtis Stephan

sections.name: Communion
sections.snippet: Come and rejoice, again, rejoice! Here is the God who saves. Now is the time, do not fear. Sing out with voices and praise:

sections.name: Meditation
sections.snippet:
God of mercy, holy myst'ry, ever faithful one,
you have pitched your tent among us
reconciling love.
Heart and mind of Christ,
live within our lives,
form us into people of mercy and grace.

sections.name: Recessional
sections.snippet:
Take the Word and go out to ev'ry land:
shine the light of Christ for all to see!
May the lives of those we touch
sing praise to God above.
Let us sing, we'll sing:
